summary: Completed regression testing after code quality refactoring. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All flows working correctly - login, registration, problem selection, voice selection, chat with AI response, burger menu. Refactored components (ChatPage with hooks, memoized contexts) working as expected.

minor.issue: OpenRouter returns 401 (User not found), but fallback to Emergent GPT-4o works correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Send button click intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay - requires force=True or Enter key to send

issues: Low text contrast on light backgrounds - accessibility concern (carried over from iteration 1)

action_items: Consider adjusting z-index of send button or 'Made with Emergent' badge to prevent click interception
Improve text contrast across pages for better accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Code refactoring successful - ChatPage split into ChatHeader, MessageList, ChatInputArea sub-components
Context memoization (AuthContext, ThemeContext, LanguageContext) properly implemented with useMemo/useCallback
useChat and useAudioStream hooks extracted correctly with proper dependency arrays
Empty catch blocks now have proper error logging (console.error with err.message)
ProfilePage uses stable keys for plan lines: key={`plan-line-${idx}-${line.slice(0, 8)}`}
ESLint warning in ChatPage.jsx about useCallback dependencies appears to be stale - code looks correct
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring verified. All features working: auth (login/register), problem selection (10 categories), voice selection (male/female), chat with AI (OpenRouter fallback to Emergent GPT-4o), TTS streaming, burger menu (9 items), tariffs (4 plans), specialists (Miron Shakira). Send button has overlay issue but Enter key works.

auth.login: PASS - Admin login works, redirects to /problems
auth.registration: PASS - New user registration works with name/email/password

problems.ui: PASS - All 10 problem cards displayed and clickable

voice_selection.ui: PASS - Male/female options present and clickable

chat.ui: PASS - ChatHeader, MessageList, ChatInputArea components render correctly
chat.tts_toggle: PASS - TTS toggle button present and functional
chat.message_send: PASS - Enter key sends message, AI responds

burger_menu.ui: PASS - Opens from chat page, shows all 9 menu items

refactoring_verification.context_memoization: VERIFIED - AuthContext, ThemeContext, LanguageContext use useMemo for context values
refactoring_verification.chat_page_split: VERIFIED - ChatPage uses ChatHeader, MessageList, ChatInputArea sub-components
refactoring_verification.hooks_extraction: VERIFIED - useChat and useAudioStream hooks working correctly
refactoring_verification.empty_catch_fixes: VERIFIED - Catch blocks now log errors with console.error
refactoring_verification.stable_keys: VERIFIED - ProfilePage uses stable keys for plan lines
